title: One Life
writer: Guy de Maupassant, Roland Laudenbach, Alexandre Astruc
actors: Maria Schell, Christian Marquand, Pascale Petit
plot: Normandy, second half of the nineteenth century. Jeanne Dandieu lives in a manor house with her parents and their servant Rosalie. She gets to know Julien, a handsome man, whom she soon marries. Her happiness is short-lived as she...
